name: AI Reception Pilot
tagline: 24/7 AI receptionist on your existing number. Live in 7 days.
deliverables: Voice agent on a forwarded number (you keep your main line)
Configured for your top 10 FAQs, booking flow, escalation rules
Multilingual coverage (JP / KR / EN out of the box)
Loom walkthrough + admin login + 30 days of tuning
Written 90-day ROI memo (the audit, baked in)
5/5 stars or full refund. No fine print.
ideal: Hotels, dive ops, restaurants, professional services. Anyone losing money to missed calls.

name: AI Workflow Build
tagline: One end-to-end AI workflow shipped. Fixed price, fixed timeline.
deliverables: Source code or n8n flows handed over
15% revshare on net new revenue (24 months, capped at $50k)
ideal: Operators who shipped Reception and know which workflow to ship next.

name: Fractional AI Engineer
tagline: Anchor on retainer. Pause any week.
ideal: Businesses that need AI work continuously, not one-off projects.

name: AnchorScan
tagline: Free 5-minute AI diagnostic for any business URL.
deliverables: Top 3 AI workflow opportunities for your business
Direct path to the AI Reception Pilot if it fits
ideal: Operators not yet sure what AI can do for them.
